title: Deleting multipul subitems from different items at once
excerpt: I have a board with over 200 items, each of them has subitems. I need to delete all the subitems at once. maybe you can do automation “delete subitem” in addition to the existing automation “create subitems”, or maybe mo…

posts.author: Yasmin-m (yasmin mazur)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a board with over 200 items, each of them has subitems. I need to delete all the subitems at once. maybe you can do automation “delete subitem” in addition to the existing automation “create subitems”, or maybe move the subitems to a single item or something.
